finding: The composite stack evidence validator existed but was not enforced by the deployment workflow, leaving artifact upload and summary publication disconnected from the final acceptance gate.

behavior: runs the composite validator unit tests before deployment
records the aggregate stack evidence packet
runs fail-closed composite validation after recording even when an earlier deployment step failed
retains the validation result in the uploaded artifact
publishes the validation artifact location in the run summary

verification.method: Fetched the committed workflow at commit 1ac8c539a131a1e2699254481f447cdd64c65202 and inspected ordering and artifact paths.
verification.test_execution: not observed in this run; the workflow is dispatch-only and Cloudflare credentials remain externally unconfigured

limits: No Cloudflare deployment occurred in this run.
No resolvable Pages hostname or Worker URL was established.
The committed regression test has not yet produced a CI result.
Infrastructure evidence does not establish scientific or medical truth.
falsification_route: Remove, reorder, or bypass the composite validation step, omit its output from artifact retention, or dispatch the workflow with complete credentials and observe acceptance despite a malformed aggregate evidence packet. Any such result falsifies the claimed gate behavior.
privacy_boundary: Repository paths, commit identifiers, workflow semantics, and infrastructure evidence only; no private chat, health, credential, or identifying personal material included.
